releaseDecision.patch: bug fix, documentation correction, packaging metadata correction, or non-breaking fixture/check update
releaseDecision.minor: new public capability, new stable configuration field, new default adapter capability, or non-breaking visible workflow improvement
releaseDecision.major: breaking Core API, output semantics, package export, project file, or command-line compatibility change

nonCiPerformancePolicy: Benchmarks are trend signals and release notes input. CI checks the benchmark wiring and contracts, not machine-specific duration thresholds.
